channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 63/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 63/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 29.5%.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer under fire after UK quietly eases strict sanctions on Russian oil
item.description: Starmer under fire after UK quietly eases strict sanctions on Russian oil

item.title: Independent UK Politics: PMQs latest: Starmer confirms plan to scrap fuel duty hike as Badenoch accuses him of buying ‘dirty’ Russian oil
item.description: PMQs latest: Starmer confirms plan to scrap fuel duty hike as Badenoch accuses him of buying ‘dirty’ Russian oil

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Starmer defends changes to Russian oil sanctions as Zelenskyy’s office asks for clarification – UK politics live
item.description: Starmer defends changes to Russian oil sanctions as Zelenskyy’s office asks for clarification – UK politics live

item.title: Bluesky · @iandunt.bsky.social: 🔴 NEW: Morgan McSweeney - Keir Starmer's chief of staff until three months ago, and reportedly back advising him - was briefed on Labour Together's controversial investigation into journalists more than two years ago...
item.description: 🔴 NEW: Morgan McSweeney - Keir Starmer's chief of staff until three months ago, and reportedly back advising him - was briefed on Labour Together's controversial investigation into journalists more than two years ago...

item.title: ConservativeHome: PMQs Badenoch brands Labour government as 'like the Soviets won'
item.description: PMQs Badenoch brands Labour government as 'like the Soviets won'

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Deputy British ambassador in Washington abruptly leaves post without explanation
item.description: Deputy British ambassador in Washington abruptly leaves post without explanation

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer says UK bagged trade deal with North Korea in PMQs blunder
item.description: Starmer says UK bagged trade deal with North Korea in PMQs blunder

item.title: i Politics: The claims Reform's Makerfield candidate is facing - and his controversial links
item.description: The claims Reform's Makerfield candidate is facing - and his controversial links

item.title: BBC Politics: Drakeford links Welsh Labour's collapse to lack of new powers from UK government
item.description: Drakeford links Welsh Labour's collapse to lack of new powers from UK government

item.title: FT UK Politics: Starmer postpones fuel duty increase
